author: Taleef Tamsal
name: Root-Safe LeakyReLU + Sliding Eval 1xH100
blurb: Non-record 1xH100, 10-train-shard root-script stack. Uses TRAIN_SEQ_LEN=4096 with lower LR, LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 MLP, and stride-64 sliding-window final eval. The matched 600s run beats the stride-64 control by 0.00688157 BPB; the 1800s confirmation reaches 1.21339931 BPB under the 16MB int8+zlib cap.
